# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin-interface
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      statusPort: 15021
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        statusPort: 15021
        readinessInitialDelaySeconds: 1
        readinessPeriodSeconds: 2
        readinessFailureThreshold: 30
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      rewriteAppHTTPProbe: true
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar-config
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels: {}
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "*/*"
  ingress:
  - port:
      number: 15000
      protocol: HTTP
      name: envoy-admin
    defaultEndpoint: 127.0.0.1:15000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-injector
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  config: |
    policy: enabled
    alwaysInjectSelector: []
    neverInjectSelector: []
    template: |
      containers:
      - name: istio-proxy
        ports:
        - containerPort: 15000
          name: http-envoy-admin
          protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        ports: ["15000"]
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-debug
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: envoy-admin
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 15000
    targetPort: 15000
    protocol: TCP
    name: http-admin
  selector:
    istio: pilot
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-endpoints
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  endpoints.txt: |
    Available Envoy Admin Endpoints:
    - /config_dump: Complete configuration dump
    - /stats: All statistics
    - /stats/prometheus: Prometheus-formatted statistics
    - /clusters: Configured upstream clusters
    - /listeners: Configured listeners
    - /server_info: Server information
    - /ready: Readiness check
    - /healthcheck/fail: Fail health check
    - /healthcheck/ok: Pass health check
    - /logging: Modify logging levels
    - /runtime: Runtime values
    - /certs: Loaded certificates
    
    Access via: kubectl exec <pod> -c istio-proxy -- curl localhost:15000/<endpoint>
